comments.body:
<!-- test-coverage-review -->

## ✅ Test Coverage Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 04:48:21 PT

No test coverage violations detected.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Summary

This PR fixes a bug in `get_diff_to_branch()` by updating it to use three-dot diff syntax (`branch...HEAD`) instead of two-dot syntax (`branch..HEAD`) to match GitHub PR behavior.

**Files changed:**
- `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` — Documentation update
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/analysis_ops/abc.py` — Docstring update
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/analysis_ops/real.py` — Bug fix to diff command syntax

### Coverage Assessment

✅ **Existing method with existing test coverage** — The modified `get_diff_to_branch()` method is tested indirectly through:
- `tests/unit/cli/commands/pr/submit_pipeline/test_extract_diff.py` — Pipeline tests verify diff extraction behavior
- `tests/integration/test_real_git.py` — Integration tests cover the RealGit implementation

✅ **Bug fix, not new feature** — The change updates an existing method's implementation details; no new untestable code added

### Patterns Checked
✅ Untested new source files — None found
✅ Source modifications with missing test coverage — None found  
✅ Deleted test files with existing source — None found

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-25 04:48:21 PT**: Bug fix to get_diff_to_branch using three-dot diff syntax; existing test coverage maintained

</details>

comments.body:
<!-- tripwires-review -->

## ✅ Tripwires Review

**Last updated:** 2026-02-25 05:04:04 PT

No violations detected across 4 files.

<details>
<summary>Details</summary>

### Tripwires Triggered
- **Architecture**: Modified existing gateway method implementation (get_diff_to_branch)
- **Testing**: Added integration test for real gateway method with subprocess calls

### Tier 1 Pattern Matches
✅ `subprocess\.run\(|run_subprocess_with_context\(` - Found (modified existing call in real.py, not a new addition)
✅ `\bgt\s+(sync|submit|restack|create|modify)` - None found
✅ `os\.chdir\(` - None found
✅ `\bimport time\b|time\.sleep\(|datetime\.now\(` - None found
✅ `Path\.home\(\).*\.claude` - None found
✅ `os\.environ.*CLAUDE_CODE_SESSION_ID` - None found
✅ `isinstance\(.*GraphiteDisabled\)` - None found
✅ `\btry:|\bexcept\s` (in fake.py/dry_run.py) - None found
✅ `json\.dumps\(.*-F` - None found
✅ `gh\s+api\s+graphql` - None found

### Tier 2 Semantic Matches
✅ Adding new methods to Git/GitHub/Graphite ABC - Not applicable (modified existing method only)
✅ Changing gateway method signature - Not applicable (signature unchanged)
✅ Adding subprocess calls requiring integration tests - **Compliant**: Modified existing subprocess call and appropriately added integration test
✅ Adding fields to dataclasses - None found
✅ File I/O or subprocess in `__init__` - None found

### Violations Summary
No violations detected.

### Files Reviewed
- `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md`: 0 violations (documentation update)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/analysis_ops/abc.py`: 0 violations (docstring update)
- `packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/git/analysis_ops/real.py`: 0 violations (git diff syntax fix: two-dot → three-dot)
- `tests/integration/test_real_git_analysis_ops.py`: 0 violations (new integration test)

### Analysis Notes
The PR modifies the `get_diff_to_branch` method to use three-dot diff syntax (`branch...HEAD`) instead of two-dot (`branch..HEAD`). This is a bug fix to match GitHub's PR diff behavior.

The architecture tripwire for "adding subprocess.run or run_subprocess_with_context calls" technically matched the pattern, but:
1. The change **modifies** an existing subprocess call (changing git command arguments), not adding a new method
2. An integration test WAS appropriately added in `tests/integration/test_real_git_analysis_ops.py`

The tripwire is **satisfied** - the test requirement for real gateway methods with subprocess calls is met.

---

### Activity Log
- **2026-02-25 05:04:04 PT**: No tripwire violations detected. Reviewed git diff syntax change (two-dot → three-dot) in existing gateway method, documentation updates, and new integration test. Subprocess modification tripwire satisfied with proper test coverage.
- **2026-02-25 04:53:45 PT**: No tripwire violations detected. Reviewed git diff syntax change (two-dot → three-dot) in existing gateway method and documentation updates.
- **2026-02-25 04:49:08 PT**: No tripwire violations detected. Reviewed git diff syntax change (two-dot → three-dot) and documentation updates.

</details>
